name: Supplier-payment commercial card - free-credit-days package test
comment: Offered package under test: 20 free days, no cashback, no fee subsidy, no lending top-up. Gated: full commercial model waits for VE-002. 2026-07-11 refinement: gross interchange re-based to official Visa UAE domestic commercial rates (2.00-2.10% general segments; segment programs and large-ticket lower) per BENCHMARKS.md - was 90/130/170 (A), now 130/180/200 (E). Run: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py subsidy knowledge-base/commercial-models/opp-002-subsidy-inputs.json
